metadata.title:
NOTICE OF SCHOOL DISTRICT


BOND ELECTION.

pages.raw_text:
Notice Is hereby given that spe-
cial election will be held in school
district, No. 81, Spokane county, state
Of Washington. on the 9TH day of No
vember, 1908, for the purpose of de-
termining whether or not the di-
rectors of said school district shall
borrow money and issue bonds of the
district in the sum of two hundred
thousand dollars ($200,000) for the
purpose of purchasing sites and erect
ing school buildings Said bonds, If
issued. shall bear interest not to ex-
coed four and one-half- per cent per
annum, payable semiannually. and
bonds to be payable twenty years
from date thereof.


The election will be by ballot.
Those in favor of the issuing of
bonds as above specified will vote.
Bonds. Yes; those opposed. Bonds.
No"


The polls will be open from
o'clock a. m. to o'clock p. m.


The polling places will be as fol-
lows:


Ward 1. Building E217 Third ave-
nue..


Ward 2. High school.


Ward 3. Washington school.


Ward A. Bancroft school


Ward s. Webster school.


Bisbee precinct. Bankson Bros.
lumber office.


BY order of the board of directors.


Dated this 18th day of October
1903. T.. G. THOMAS,
Secretary of the Board of Directors.
